title: rubus ruborensis
intro: Rubus ruborensis, also known as the Himalayan Raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus ruborensis include reducing oxidative stress, improving cardiovascular health, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties. Rubus ruborensis can be prepared as a herbal tea, decoction, or tincture, and is also used in the production of jams and preserves due to its edible fruit.
